title: monolopia major
intro: Monolopia major, also known as the California fleabane, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Baja California. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Monolopia major has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as to reduce fever and promote digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its health benefits.
